overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a poncho and cowboy hat walking through a desert canyon landscape. The character approaches and passes a wooden wagon with an NPC, then continues up a winding trail toward large red rock formations reminiscent of Monument Valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with scattered shrubs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the desert plain toward a wooden wagon parked near the trail

entered.detail: large monolithic red rock formation resembling a butte, dominating the horizon
flat-topped mesa formation in the distance
old wooden covered wagon with dark canvas top, parked beside the trail
scattered low-lying desert vegetation and sagebrush

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open desert landscape with a dirt trail cutting through sparse vegetation. A large red rock formation rises in the distance ahead, while a wooden wagon sits parked near the path. The sun shines brightly from the left, casting long shadows across the arid terrain.

events.description: approaching and passing the wooden wagon with NPC standing nearby

agents.ego_description: passing by the wagon and NPC, continuing along the dirt trail

notable_agents.action: woman standing beside the wagon, appears to gesture or wave as the character passes

entered.detail: female character in light-colored clothing standing near the wagon

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the wooden wagon where a woman stands nearby. After passing the wagon, the character continues forward as the large red rock formation looms closer ahead. The NPC remains by the wagon as the character moves past.

events.description: trail begins to ascend noticeably up the hillside toward the rock formation

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined dirt trail, kicking up dust as the path steepens

segments.scene_description: The character continues up the winding trail as it ascends the hillside. The wooden wagon and NPC fall behind and out of view. The path becomes steeper and dust kicks up with each step. The large rock formation shifts to the left as the character approaches its base.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon edge trail with cliff views

events.description: rounding the base of the tall rock formation, revealing canyon views to the right

agents.ego_description: navigating the trail around the rock formation with canyon views opening up to the right

entered.detail: steep canyon walls and cliffs visible in the distance to the right
layered red rock formations and mesas visible across the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character rounds the base of the large rock formation, which now falls behind to the left. The landscape opens up to reveal a vast canyon with steep cliffs to the right and distant rock formations across the valley. The trail continues along the canyon edge as dust blows across the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an arid desert landscape that gradually ascends and opens into a vast canyon vista. It begins on a dirt trail under a bright sun, moving past sparse vegetation toward a distant red rock formation and a parked wooden wagon. As the character approaches and passes the wagon and a standing woman, the camera continues forward, causing the red rock to loom larger in the frame. The scene then shifts as the trail winds steeply up a hillside, leaving the wagon behind and kicking up dust before the massive rock formation pivots to the left. Finally, the camera rounds the base of the formation to reveal a wide valley with steep cliffs and distant peaks stretching across the horizon.
